entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00219) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00219 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO INCREASE THE CEILING FOR CLIN 8019 "NATIONAL&NATURAL DISASTER HELP DESK" TO $150,000.00 AND CLIN 8019A "NATIONAL&NATURAL DISATER HELP DESK AWARD FEE" TO $12,000.00.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00221) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00221 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXTEND, AT NO COST, THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE TO CLINS 7030 "RETIREMENT TRANSITION SERVICES", 7031 "WORKFORCE PLANNING TRANSITION SERVICES", AND 7032 "POSITION MANAGEMENT/POSITION CLASSIFICATION (PMPC)" TO JANUARY 1, 2017. WE WILL ALSO BE CHANGING THE POP FOR ADVISORY SERVICES CLINS 7030A, 7031A AND 7032A TO 1/2/17 THROUGH 3/3/17.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00224) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00224 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS AS FOLLOWS:
14A. TO ADD AND EXERCISE CLIN 7038 "FIELD POSITION R&H TRANSITION" IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1,490,227.46.
14B. TO ADD AND EXERCISE CLIN 7038 "FIELD POSITION R&H TRANSITION" IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $76,568.66.
14C. TO ADD THE RECRUITMENT AND HIRING (R&H) STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW) TO THE OHCACCESS CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00226) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00226 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD CLINS 8037A "PROCESS SUITE IMPLEMENTATION (PLUS CONTRACT CHANGE COSTS)", 8037B "ENTERPRISE CONTENT MANAGMEENT (OPTIONAL) AND 8037C "TRAVEL" IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $4,267,409.47 AND TO ADD THE RESPECTIVE STATMENT OF WORK.
CLIN 8037A "PROCESS SUITE IMPLEMENTATION (PLUS CONTRACT CHANGE COSTS)" COST-PLUS-FIXED-FEE COST: $2,838,494.93 FEE: $283,847.57 TOTAL: $3,122,342.50
CLIN 8037B "ENTERPRISE CONTENT MANAGMENT (OPTIONAL)" COST-PLUS-FIXED-FEE COST: $1,005,795.58 FEE: $100,578.40 TOTAL: $1,106,373.98
CLIN 8037C "TRAVEL" COST TOTAL: $38,692.99
TOTAL: $4,267,409.47

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
